Specify a lace family or construction method.
Always describe holes/voids, not only flowers.
Do not let lace become flat printed texture unless explicitly wanted.
Distinguish mesh ground from decorative motif.
Mention thread paths, shadows, and transparency.
For laser-cut/vector use, ensure islands are bridged.
For crochet lace, mention chains, shells, picots, mesh, and motifs.
For bobbin lace, mention twisted/crossed thread logic.
For needle lace, mention bars, brides, buttonhole edges, and fillings.
